subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Thou art the Succourer, Thou art the Helper. Verily, Thou art the Bountiful, the Compassionate, the All-Merciful. Sanctified are Thy names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت المغیث و انت المعین و انک انت البر الروف الرحیم تنزهت اسمائک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
